## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:run`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No shell strings or command interpolation from user input.
- [ ] No secrets added to source, tests, logs, docs, or fixtures.
- [ ] Path, CORS/CSRF, rate-limit, and redaction invariants still hold where relevant.
